mapper.insert: insert into study_user_view ( user_id, type, target_id, ip_addr, create_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{type}, #{targetId}, #{ipAddr}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT v.view_id, v.user_id, v.type, v.target_id, v.ip_addr, v.create_time, CASE WHEN v.type = '1' THEN l.title WHEN v.type = '2' THEN a.title ELSE '未知' END as title FROM study_user_view v LEFT JOIN study_lesson l ON v.type = '1' AND v.target_id = l.lesson_id LEFT JOIN study_article a ON v.type = '2' AND v.target_id = a.article_id WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY v.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT v.view_id as id, v.user_id as userId, v.target_id as targetId, v.type, CASE WHEN v.type = '1' THEN l.title WHEN v.type = '2' THEN a.title ELSE '' END as title, v.ip_addr as ipAddr, v.create_time as createTime, CASE WHEN v.type = '2' THEN SUBSTRING(a.content, 1, 150) ELSE '' END as contentSummary, CASE WHEN v.type = '1' THEN SUBSTRING(l.description, 1, 150) ELSE '' END as descriptionSummary FROM study_user_view v LEFT JOIN study_lesson l ON v.type = '1' AND v.target_id = l.lesson_id LEFT JOIN study_article a ON v.type = '2' AND v.target_id = a.article_id WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY v.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT u.user_id as userId, u.user_name as userName, IFNULL(article_views.view_count, 0) as articleViewCount, IFNULL(lesson_views.view_count, 0) as lessonViewCount, IFNULL(article_likes.like_count, 0) as articleLikeCount, IFNULL(lesson_likes.like_count, 0) as lessonLikeCount, IFNULL(article_collects.collect_count, 0) as articleCollectCount, IFNULL(lesson_collects.collect_count, 0) as lessonCollectCount, ( IFNULL(article_views.view_count, 0) + IFNULL(lesson_views.view_count, 0) + IFNULL(article_likes.like_count, 0) + IFNULL(lesson_likes.like_count, 0) + IFNULL(article_collects.collect_count, 0) + IFNULL(lesson_collects.collect_count, 0) ) as totalActions FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM study_user_view WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ) active_users ON u.user_id = active_users.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT target_id) as view_count FROM study_user_view WHERE type = '2' AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY user_id ) article_views ON u.user_id = article_views.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT target_id) as view_count FROM study_user_view WHERE type = '1' AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY user_id ) lesson_views ON u.user_id = lesson_views.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT target_id) as like_count FROM study_user_like WHERE type = '2' AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY user_id ) article_likes ON u.user_id = article_likes.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT target_id) as like_count FROM study_user_like WHERE type = '1' AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY user_id ) lesson_likes ON u.user_id = lesson_likes.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT target_id) as collect_count FROM study_user_collect WHERE type = '2' AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY user_id ) article_collects ON u.user_id = article_collects.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT target_id) as collect_count FROM study_user_collect WHERE type = '1' AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY user_id ) lesson_collects ON u.user_id = lesson_collects.user_id ORDER BY totalActions DESC
